decisions: 2026-03-20: 1 PRD covering significance classifier, prompt templates, title generation, and filter hooks
2026-03-20: Title format = [Plugin Name] [Version] — [AI-generated subtitle]; AI owns the subtitle with significance-aware guidance, plugin prepends name+version programmatically
2026-03-20: Significance signals are AI-generated guidance: patch=brief/functional, minor=highlight 1-2 improvements, major=lead with headline feature, security=always lead with 'Security update'
2026-03-20: Post audience = general site owners primary; developer content included but clearly sectioned (e.g. 'For developers, changes included...')
2026-03-20: Post length = fluid based on content; single paragraph for tiny updates, up to ~7 paragraphs max
2026-03-20: Images = v1 includes release body images + draft mode placeholder blocks; linked ticket/PR images deferred to v2
2026-03-20: Download link priority = custom URL (per-repo) → WordPress.org slug (per-repo, if provided) → GitHub release URL
2026-03-20: Non-semver tags = default to minor significance + log a debug note
2026-03-20: Security fix = always treated as at least minor significance regardless of semver patch level
